windows.summary_v2: A wax-melting pitcher with a stir spatula sits in a water-filled pot on the stove as a double boiler, with a hand steadying it.

seconds_v2.desc: A tall aluminium pouring pitcher with a blue silicone spatula inside sits in a stainless steel pot of water on a black glass cooktop, set up as a double boiler to melt wax.
Same double-boiler setup; the metal pitcher rests in the water-filled pot, spatula handle sticking up, a round lid lying on the stovetop at left.
Unchanged stovetop view of the pitcher-in-pot double boiler heating, kitchen counter and jars blurred behind.
A bare hand with red nails reaches in from the right toward the pitcher; the double boiler continues warming on the cooktop.
Fingertips touch the rim/side of the metal pitcher seated in the simmering pot of water.
Hand steadies the pitcher in the water bath; blue spatula still resting inside ready to stir wax.
The hand grips the pitcher's black handle, holding it upright in the double boiler.
Hand holds the pitcher by its handle, beginning to steady or lift it slightly within the pot of water.
Fingers reach into the pitcher toward the blue spatula, about to stir the melting wax in the double boiler.

windows.embed_text_v2: Second-pour top-up of amber wax into pillar candle moulds on a metal drip tray, wicks centred by clip bars across the mould tops; large metal pouring pot ready, newspaper-covered counter.
windows.summary_v2: Pillar candle moulds with shrunken white wax cores have been topped up with a second pour of amber wax which sits cooling in each mould's well.

tags_v2.action: second-pour top up of pillar moulds

seconds_v2.desc: Pillar candle moulds (textured rough-edged cylindrical) stand on a foil-lined drip tray; the white wax has shrunk and a second amber/yellow second-pour fill sits at the top of each, wicks held centred by metal cross-bars; person at right with newspaper-covered counter.
Same scene — the amber re-pour pools of wax sit in each mould's well; person's torso visible behind, holding a paper towel.
Static view: the second-pour amber wax remains liquid on top of the shrunken white wax cores inside each pillar mould; wick bars across.
Maker's arm reaches in from upper right with a large metal pouring pot, prepares to add more wax to top up another mould.
Pouring pot held steady over the moulds; amber pools clearly visible in the lower row of moulds.
Pot lifted slightly; arm steady; moulds with second-pour amber wax remain set on the tray.
Continued — the amber wax in the front-row moulds has begun to skin/cool, no fresh pour added yet.
Person leans in with a paper towel/cloth at right, possibly wiping a drip; amber re-pour pools settling.
Static — moulds with topped-up amber pools curing; drip tray collecting overflow drips around the bases.

seconds_v2.desc: Several cylindrical pillar candle moulds stand in a metal baking tray, each spanned by a metal wick-centering bar holding the wick, with amber wax pooled and overflowing at the tops; a finished yellow flower-textured beeswax pillar sits at right on newspaper.
Same tray of moulded pillars topping off with amber wax; a person's torso in a dark shirt (ring on hand) stands behind holding a blue stir stick, no face shown.
Pillar moulds with wick bars rest in the tray, amber top-up wax glossy in the recessed tops; person's midsection visible behind.
Unchanged view of the setting pillar candles in their moulds, wick holders across each, drips of yellow wax on the tray.
The textured pillar moulds continue cooling, amber wax filling the sunken centers around the wicks.
Person behind holds the blue stick over the tray; moulded pillars sit with wick-centering bars and pooled wax tops.
Steady shot of the tray of pillar candle moulds setting, wicks held upright by metal bars.
Same arrangement of moulded pillars cooling in the tray with amber top wax and finished beeswax pillar at right.
Pillar candles in moulds rest in the metal tray, wick bars in place, wax tops solidifying.

windows.summary_v2: A slow panning showcase of many finished honey-colored beeswax figural candles (pinecones, gnomes, snowmen, flowers, trees, pillars) displayed on a floral tablecloth, with a like/share/follow overlay.

seconds_v2.desc: A spread of finished honey-colored beeswax candles (pine cones, gnomes, snowmen, flowers, trees, pillars) on a floral tablecloth; a pink 'LIKE SHARE FOLLOW' graphic overlay sits across the lower right.
Camera pans over the same beeswax candle display showing carved pillar, gnome, pinecone and rose-shaped candles on the patterned cloth.
Continued slow pan across rows of finished beeswax figural candles including a tall textured tree and several pinecones.
View moves closer over pinecone-shaped and snowman beeswax candles with white wicks arranged on the tablecloth.
Camera glides across more finished beeswax candles, gnomes and pinecones in foreground, a smooth pillar candle behind.
Close pan over clustered pinecone, cone-tree and snowman beeswax candles, all cured with trimmed wicks.
Display continues with a snowman candle, honeycomb-textured cones and pinecones filling the frame.
